subcodes.first_line: O ye two beloved friends of God! Though your hardships have multiplied and diverse tribulations have recurred [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای اللهک ایکی سوگلی دوستلری سزک هر نقدر مشقتنز چوقالدی و درلو درلو مصیبت تکرر
subcodes.subjects: @Imam Husayn, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @martyrs and martyrdom, @consolation and comfort, @thankfulness; gratitude
